component.name: View Materials
component.description: White card with **Unassigned** band (`Foundation/Background/Default` + `Typography/LABEL` secondary), material rows: name + quantity (`Typography/Body` secondary) left, price (`Typography/Body-Bold`) right, `Spacing/16` padding. Consecutive rows in the same group separated by `1px rgba(43,52,65,0.05)`. **Materials Multi Session** (`1287:668`): bordered frame = `view-materials-card-surface` only; unassigned stack wrapped in `view-materials-unassigned-block`; session block `{date} Session` (date as-typed, **Session** uppercased). **Materials Single Session** / **Materials Same Session**: extra `view-materials-card` frame outside surface (Figma); Same = multiple unassigned rows only (`1287:721`). Heights hug content.
component.variantProperty: Property 1 (Materials Same Session `1287:721` has no `Property 1=` prefix)

codeProps.sessionBlock: optional; rendered when variant is materialsMultiSession and items.length > 0

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: View Materials (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.view-materials-card: bordered white frame — **Single Session** + **Materials Same Session** only; wraps `view-materials-card-surface`
figmaLayerNames.view-materials-unassigned-block: Multi Session: bucket + first row stack above `view-materials-session-section`
figmaLayerNames.view-materials-body: React-only wrapper inside surface; Figma omits this frame (stack bucket + rows + optional session in surface)
figmaLayerNames.view-materials-item-list: React `MaterialItemList`; Figma rows are direct children / row stacks

notes: 2026-04-10: `ViewMaterialsCard` in `view-materials/` from Figma `1287:618`. Structural layers now use `view-materials-*` slots, the card stays a vertical auto-layout-style stack, and no flattening is needed in automation.
2026-04-07: `ViewMaterialsCard` in `view-materials/` from Figma `1287:618`. Row chrome matches View Notes session headers; no leading icons in reference.
2026-04-11: Figma sync — Multi vs Single/Same hierarchy, `materialsSameSession`, session header typography.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `1287:618` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Generic `Container` / `Input` chrome renamed to `view-materials-*` (card / surface, bucket header + label, row + row-content + name/quantity/price, session section + session header + text). Multi Session (`1287:668`): bordered `view-materials-card-surface` stacks `view-materials-unassigned-block` and `view-materials-session-section`. Materials Same Session (`1287:721`): `view-materials-card` > `view-materials-card-surface`, two unassigned rows, no session block. No `flatten()` in automation.

2026-04-11: Sync Figma `1287:618` — DOM matches layer names (Multi: surface + unassigned-block; Single/Same: card + surface); session band copy `{date} ` + uppercase **Session**; outer `view-materials-root` + py 9; third code variant `materialsSameSession`.
